scenario_name: PMCF Is Not a Universal Patch
description: PMCF should not be the default disposition when evidence is merely limited. Some gaps require claim_narrowing or cannot_support, not PMCF. PMCF is for 'promising but insufficient', not for 'contradicted or absent'.

available_evidence.findings: Bleeding complication rate: 5% device vs 6% control. p=0.45. No significant difference.

gap_analysis.reason: Evidence shows no significant difference from control. PMCF would not resolve this — the claim itself is unsupported by available data. Claim narrowing or cannot_support is more appropriate than PMCF.

expected_expert_reasoning.reason: Evidence shows no significant benefit (p=0.45). PMCF is not appropriate — additional study is unlikely to change the conclusion. Claim should be narrowed or rejected.
